name: Shopify store owners processing 10–50 sales/week tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 sales/week, delayed sales reporting causes missed inventory optimization opportunities. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to generate timely sales reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to generate timely sales reports
